hero.subtitle: Drop in a vendor quote. Get back exactly where you're overpaying, what to push for, and a ready-to-send email — in under 60 seconds.
hero.noSignup: No signup needed. Free to try.
hero.check1: Spot hidden fees, inflated rates, and unfavorable clauses
hero.check2: Get a negotiation playbook with asks that move the needle
hero.check3: Send a polished reply in your tone, ready to copy and go
hero.verdictDesc: You're overpaying on ad fees and the retainer is above market. Two asks could save you €16,800/year.
hero.redFlagTitle: 20% ad fee — double the industry standard
hero.redFlagDesc: €1,800/mo in ad fees vs €900 at 10%. That's €10,800/yr overpaid.
hero.emailSnippet: "The 20% ad fee is above the 10% we've seen elsewhere. At €9K/month spend, that's €10,800/year — could we align on 10%?"

builtFor.buyersDesc: Buying services, equipment, or supplies and wanting to stop leaving money on the table at every renewal.

privacy.noTrainingDesc: Your pricing, terms, and vendor details are never fed back into any model.

pricing.title: Start free. Scale when ready.

social.quote1: After years of watching founders and ops managers sign contracts they shouldn't have, I built the tool I wished they'd had. TermLift is real procurement thinking — not generic AI.
social.quote2: Most people don't overpay because they're bad at negotiation. They overpay because they don't know what to look for. TermLift closes that gap in 60 seconds.
social.quote3: Every red flag, every negotiation ask, every email draft comes from patterns seen across hundreds of real vendor contracts — not a prompt template.

cta.title: That quote in your inbox? You're probably overpaying.
cta.subtitle: Find out in 60 seconds. No signup, no commitment — just clarity on what you should be paying.

footer.description: AI-powered vendor quote analyzer. Get better deals in 60 seconds.

about.heroTitle: Built by someone who's been on your side of the table
about.heroSubtitle: TermLift was built by a procurement professional — not a tech team that's never negotiated a contract.
about.whyContent:
After 8 years working in procurement, I kept seeing the same problem. Founders signing SaaS contracts they didn't understand. Operations managers renewing supplier agreements without pushing back. Small business owners accepting vendor terms because they didn't know what to ask for.

The knowledge to negotiate better deals exists — it lives in procurement departments at large companies. TermLift makes that knowledge available to everyone, in 60 seconds, for any quote or contract.
about.card1Desc: Every red flag, negotiation ask, and email draft is built on real procurement experience. Not generic AI output.
about.card2Desc: You shouldn't need a VP of Procurement to get better terms. TermLift levels the playing field.
about.card3Desc: Your vendor pricing is confidential. We built TermLift with that in mind from day one — encrypted, never trained on, deleted after analysis.
about.founderBio: TermLift was built by a procurement professional currently working in the industry — across vendor negotiations, SaaS contracts, agency agreements, and supplier management. Built to solve a problem seen every day: good people signing bad contracts because they didn't have the right tools.
about.value1Desc: We tell you what we actually find, not what you want to hear.
about.value2Desc: Procurement expertise shouldn't require a procurement degree.

pricingPage.starterDesc: 1 analysis free, no signup. Sign up for 3 more.
pricingPage.proDesc: Unlimited analyses with full spend tracking.
proFeatures: Full red flags, plan & 3 email tones
pricingPage.seeExample: See an example analysis before you decide
pricingPage.faq1q: Can I use TermLift without signing up?
pricingPage.faq1a: Yes. You get 1 free analysis with no signup required. After that, create a free account to unlock 3 more analyses (4 total on the Starter plan).
pricingPage.faq2q: What happens after I use my 4 free analyses?
pricingPage.faq2a: You can upgrade to Pro (€39/mo) for unlimited analyses, full spend tracking, and deal management. Click any 'Upgrade' button to get started instantly.
pricingPage.faq3a: Each time you submit a quote or document for AI analysis counts as one. This includes initial analyses and follow-up rounds on existing deals.
pricingPage.faq4q: What's the difference between Starter and Pro?
pricingPage.faq4a: Starter gives you 4 analyses to try TermLift for free. Pro is for active negotiators — unlimited analyses, 90-day spend tracking, and full deal management.
pricingPage.faq5a: Yes — Pro is a monthly subscription with no commitment. Cancel anytime from your account settings and you'll keep access until the end of your billing period.

helpPage.title: Frequently asked questions
helpPage.subtitle: How TermLift works, what to expect, and how we handle your data.
helpPage.cat1a1: TermLift is an AI-powered tool that helps you negotiate better vendor deals. Upload a quote or contract, and it finds red flags, estimates potential savings, builds a negotiation plan with specific asks, and drafts ready-to-send reply emails — all in about 60 seconds.
helpPage.cat1a2: TermLift is not legal advice, not a guarantee of savings, and not a replacement for reading your contracts. It's a starting point that gives you leverage and structure — but you should always review the outputs yourself and consult a professional for legal or financial decisions.
helpPage.cat1q3: How does the AI analysis work?
helpPage.cat1a3: Text is extracted from your document (PDF, image, or pasted text) and sent to Anthropic's Claude AI, which is prompted specifically for procurement analysis. It reads the full content, identifies risks, builds a negotiation strategy, and generates structured output — typically in under 60 seconds.
helpPage.cat2q1: How do I upload a quote?
helpPage.cat2a1: You have four options: paste text directly into the text box, upload a PDF file, upload an image (PNG, JPG, or WEBP), or take a screenshot of a pricing page or email. Just drag and drop or click the upload area on the analysis page.
helpPage.cat2a2: PDF, PNG, JPG, WEBP, or plain text paste. Maximum file size is 10 MB. For best results with images, make sure the text in the image is clearly readable.
helpPage.cat2q3: Can I analyze an email from a vendor?
helpPage.cat2a3: Yes. Just copy the email text and paste it directly into the text input. You can include the full email — subject line, body, pricing tables, terms — and TermLift will analyze all of it.
helpPage.cat3q1: What do I get back from an analysis?
helpPage.cat3a1: You get a complete negotiation package: a verdict summary, red flags with suggested mitigations, a negotiation plan split into must-have and nice-to-have asks, estimated potential savings, and ready-to-send email drafts in three different tones.
helpPage.cat3q2: What are the email drafts for?
helpPage.cat3a2: They're ready-to-copy replies you can send directly to your vendor. Each analysis generates three versions — Friendly (collaborative tone), Direct (professional and to the point), and Firm (assertive with clear expectations). Pick the one that fits your relationship with the vendor and copy it.
helpPage.cat3a3: No. AI can miss details, misinterpret terms, or make errors. TermLift is a starting point for negotiation, not the final word. Always review the outputs against your original documents before acting on them. If something looks off, it probably is — trust your judgment.
helpPage.cat4a1: Yes. Uploaded files are deleted immediately after text extraction. Your text is not stored unless you explicitly save the deal to your account. All data is encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest. Your documents are never used for AI training.
helpPage.cat4q2: What if I upload confidential documents?
helpPage.cat4a2: Treat TermLift like any cloud-based tool. Don't upload documents you're contractually prohibited from sharing with third-party services. Your text is sent to Anthropic's API for processing. See our Privacy Policy and Terms for full details.
helpPage.cat5a1: You get 1 free analysis with no signup required. Create an account and you get 3 more — 4 total on the Starter plan. No credit card needed.
helpPage.cat5a2: €39/month for unlimited analyses, plus features like saved deals and analysis history. Coming soon.
helpPage.cat5a3: €149/month for a team workspace with up to 3 seats, shared deal history, and priority support. Coming soon.
helpPage.cat5a4: Yes. Go to your profile settings and choose "Delete account." All your data — saved deals, analysis history, account info — is permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
helpPage.cat6a1: Try running it again. If it keeps failing, the document may be too long or in an unsupported format. Try pasting just the key sections as plain text instead. If the problem persists, email hello@termlift.com and we'll help.
helpPage.cat6q2: The analysis doesn't match my document
helpPage.cat6a2: AI can misinterpret content, especially from images or complex PDFs with tables and fine print. For better results, try pasting the key sections as plain text instead of uploading a file. If the analysis is way off, let us know at hello@termlift.com so we can improve.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.summary1: Uploaded files are deleted immediately after processing — we never store your raw documents.
privacyPage.summary2: Only the AI-generated analysis is saved, and only if you choose to keep it.
privacyPage.summary3: Extracted text is sent to Anthropic (Claude AI) for analysis — they don't train on API data.
privacyPage.summary4: We don't sell, share, or use your data for advertising.
privacyPage.summary5: You can delete your account and all associated data anytime.
privacyPage.s1p1: TermLift is a deal analysis platform operated by its founding team. We help procurement and finance teams analyze supplier quotes and contracts using AI to surface negotiation leverage and identify risks.
privacyPage.s2Account1: Email address (for login and service communications)
privacyPage.s2Account2: Password (hashed — we never store or see your plaintext password)
privacyPage.s2DealData: Deal Data (only if you choose to save):
privacyPage.s2Deal1: Extracted text from your uploaded documents
privacyPage.s2Deal2: AI-generated analysis output (negotiation insights, risk flags, benchmarks)
privacyPage.s2Deal3: Deal metadata (title, vendor name, deal type, etc.)
privacyPage.s2Payment1: Processed by Stripe (coming soon) — we never store your card details
privacyPage.s2Payment2: We only see transaction IDs and subscription status
privacyPage.s2Auto1: IP address, browser type, and device information
privacyPage.s2Auto2: Usage patterns and feature interaction via PostHog analytics
privacyPage.s3Item1: Provide the AI-powered deal analysis service
privacyPage.s3Item4: Send service updates and important notifications (not marketing unless you opt in)
privacyPage.s3Item5: Improve the service based on aggregated, anonymized usage patterns
privacyPage.s3Item6: Prevent fraud, abuse, and unauthorized access
privacyPage.s4Intro: We only share data with the service providers necessary to run TermLift. We do not sell, rent, or share your data with advertisers, data brokers, or social media platforms.
privacyPage.s4AnthropicDesc: Extracted text from your documents is sent to Anthropic's Claude AI for analysis. Anthropic does not use API data to train their models.
privacyPage.s4SupabaseDesc: Database and authentication hosting. SOC 2 Type II certified. All data encrypted at rest and in transit.
privacyPage.s4VercelDesc: Application hosting and deployment. SOC 2 certified with enterprise-grade infrastructure.
privacyPage.s4PostHogDesc: Anonymized product analytics to understand how features are used and improve the service. No personally identifiable information is shared for analytics purposes.
privacyPage.s4StripeDesc: Payment processing. Stripe handles all card data securely under PCI DSS Level 1 compliance. We never see or store your full card number.
privacyPage.s5Item1: Deleted immediately after text extraction — we never store your raw documents
privacyPage.s5Item2: Kept until you delete them or close your account
privacyPage.s5Item4: Retained for up to 90 days, then automatically purged
privacyPage.s5Note: We do not sell or share your data with advertisers. When you delete data, it is permanently removed from our systems.
privacyPage.s6Intro: We use minimal cookies, strictly for functionality and analytics. We do not use advertising or tracking cookies.
privacyPage.s6Session1: Supabase auth cookies to keep you logged in securely
privacyPage.s6Session2: These are essential for the service to function
privacyPage.s6Analytics1: PostHog cookies for anonymized product analytics
privacyPage.s6Analytics2: Used to understand usage patterns and improve the service
privacyPage.s7Intro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and similar data protection laws, you have the following rights:
privacyPage.s7AccessDesc: Request a copy of all personal data we hold about you
privacyPage.s7DeleteDesc: Request deletion of your account and all associated data at any time — this is also available directly in your profile settings
privacyPage.s7CorrectDesc: Update or correct any inaccurate personal information
privacyPage.s7ExportDesc: Receive your data in a portable, machine-readable format
privacyPage.s7ObjectDesc: Object to certain types of data processing
privacyPage.s7Contact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at {email}. We will respond to your request within 30 days.
privacyPage.s8Text: Your data may be processed in the United States and other countries where our service providers (Anthropic, Supabase, Vercel, Stripe) operate. For transfers of personal data outside the European Economic Area (EEA) and the United Kingdom, we rely on Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission to ensure adequate protection of your data.
privacyPage.s9Text: TermLift is not intended for users under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us and we will promptly delete it.
privacyPage.s10Text: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. If we make material changes, we will notify you via email at least 14 days before the changes take effect. Continued use of TermLift after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.s1Text: By accessing or using TermLift, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you don't agree, please don't use the service. These terms apply to all users, whether you have an account or not.
termsPage.s2Intro: TermLift analyzes vendor quotes and contracts using AI, specifically Anthropic's Claude. Here's how it works:
termsPage.s2Item1: You upload a document (quote, contract, proposal, etc.)
termsPage.s2Item2: We extract text from the document
termsPage.s2Item3: The extracted text is sent to the AI for analysis
termsPage.s2Item4: You receive negotiation insights including red flags, savings opportunities, negotiation plans, and draft emails
termsPage.s2Item5: Uploaded files are deleted after processing
termsPage.s3Item1: TermLift is NOT legal, financial, or professional advice.
termsPage.s3Item2: TermLift is NOT a guarantee of savings or improved contract terms.
termsPage.s3Item3: AI analysis may be incomplete, inaccurate, or miss important details.
termsPage.s3Item4: Always review outputs yourself and consult licensed professionals before making decisions.
termsPage.s3Item5: Results vary by deal — past analyses don't predict future outcomes.
termsPage.s4Intro: When using TermLift, you agree to:
termsPage.s4Item3: Only upload content you have the right to share
termsPage.s4Item4: Not abuse, hack, or reverse-engineer the service
termsPage.s4Item5: Not share your account credentials with others
termsPage.s4Item6: Not use the service for automated bulk processing without our written permission
termsPage.s5StarterDesc: 4 total analyses — 1 without signing up, 3 more after creating an account.
termsPage.s5Item1: When paid plans launch, payments will be processed securely via Stripe
termsPage.s5Item3: You can cancel anytime from your profile
termsPage.s5Item4: No refunds for partial billing periods
termsPage.s5Item5: After cancellation, access continues until the end of your current billing period
termsPage.s5Item6: We may change pricing with at least 30 days notice
termsPage.s6YourContentDesc: You own what you upload. By using the service, you grant us a limited, temporary license to process your content solely for the purpose of providing the analysis. We don't claim ownership of your documents.
termsPage.s6OurContentDesc: TermLift's interface, branding, design, and proprietary prompts are our property. You may not copy, modify, or redistribute them.
termsPage.s6AiOutputsDesc: Analysis results are provided to you for your use. However, they are AI-generated and should not be treated as professional advice. You're free to use the outputs, but you do so at your own discretion and risk.
termsPage.s7Intro: TermLift is provided "as is" and "as available." We do our best to keep things running smoothly, but:
termsPage.s7Item1: The service may experience downtime or bugs
termsPage.s7Item2: We may add, change, or remove features at any time
termsPage.s7Item3: We are not liable for outages, data loss, or service interruptions
termsPage.s7Item4: We don't guarantee that the service will meet all of your requirements
termsPage.s8Item1: You can close your account at any time and request deletion of your data
termsPage.s8Item2: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these Terms or fail to pay
termsPage.s8Item3: We may discontinue the service entirely with at least 30 days notice
termsPage.s8Item4: Upon termination, your right to use the service ends immediately (except for access through a paid billing period you've already paid for)
termsPage.s9Intro: To the maximum extent permitted by law:
termsPage.s9Item1: TermLift is not liable for business losses, lost deals, or missed savings opportunities.
termsPage.s9Item2: TermLift is not liable for errors, omissions, or inaccuracies in AI-generated analysis.
termsPage.s9Item3: Our total liability is limited to the amount you have paid us in the last 12 months.
termsPage.s9Item4: TermLift is not liable for the actions or failures of third-party services (Anthropic, Stripe, etc.).
termsPage.s10Text: You agree to indemnify and hold TermLift harmless from any claims, damages, or expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising from your use of the service, the content you upload, or your violation of these Terms.
termsPage.s11Item1: If you have a dispute, contact us at {email} and we'll try to resolve it informally within 30 days.
termsPage.s11Item2: If informal resolution fails, disputes will be resolved through binding arbitration rather than in court.
termsPage.s11Item3: Disputes must be brought individually, not as part of a class action or representative proceeding.
termsPage.s11Item4: These Terms are governed by the laws of Ireland.
termsPage.s11Note: Note: Some jurisdictions don't allow arbitration waivers or class action waivers. In those jurisdictions, the applicable restrictions above will not apply to you, and disputes will be resolved in the courts of Ireland.
termsPage.s12Text: We may update these Terms from time to time. For material changes, we'll notify you via email at least 14 days before they take effect. Continued use of the service after changes take effect means you accept the updated Terms.
termsPage.s13Item1: These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and TermLift.
termsPage.s13Item2: If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions continue in full force.
termsPage.s13Item3: We may assign our rights under these Terms. You may not assign yours without our written consent.
termsPage.s13Item4: Our failure to enforce any provision is not a waiver of that provision. Any waiver must be in writing.
termsPage.s14Text: Questions about these Terms? Reach out to us at {email}

securityPage.title: How we handle your data
securityPage.subtitle: No marketing spin. Here's exactly what happens to your files, where your data goes, and what we're still working on.
securityPage.keyPrinciple: Files are deleted immediately after analysis. Only AI-generated outputs are saved — and only if you explicitly choose to save the deal.
securityPage.uploadTitle: What happens when you upload a file
securityPage.step1Desc: We extract text from your PDF or image. The file is held in memory only.
securityPage.step2Desc: Extracted text is sent to Anthropic's API over TLS for analysis.
securityPage.step3Desc: Original file deleted immediately. It never touches our database.
securityPage.bottomLineDesc: Your original files are never stored. Only AI-generated analysis is saved — and only if you click save.
securityPage.inTransitDesc: All data transmitted over TLS (HTTPS). This applies to file uploads, API calls to Anthropic, and all communication with Supabase and Vercel.
securityPage.atRestDesc: Supabase encrypts all stored data with AES-256 encryption. This covers saved deal analyses, account data, and any metadata in our database.
securityPage.fileDeletionDesc1: When you upload a PDF or image, we extract the text in memory and immediately discard the original file. It is never written to a database, never saved to disk storage, and never logged. Once the analysis is complete, the extracted text exists only in the AI response.
securityPage.fileDeletionDesc2: If you choose not to save the deal, nothing is persisted at all — the analysis result is discarded when you leave the page.
securityPage.onlySavedWhenYouSaySo: Only saved when you say so
securityPage.extractedTextDesc1: Extracted text from your documents is not stored by default. It's sent to the AI, the AI produces an analysis, and the extracted text is discarded.
securityPage.extractedTextDesc2: If you explicitly save a deal, the AI-generated analysis (risk scores, clause breakdowns, recommendations) is stored in your account. The raw extracted text may be stored alongside it so you can reference the original content — but only if you choose to save.
securityPage.anthropicNoTrain: Anthropic doesn't train on API data
securityPage.aiTrainingDesc1: We use Anthropic's API (Claude) for analysis. Anthropic's API terms explicitly state that data sent through the API is not used to train their models. Your contract text is not being fed into future AI models.
securityPage.aiTrainingDesc2: We also don't use your data to train any models ourselves. We don't build datasets from user uploads. Period.
securityPage.gdprDesc1: We comply with GDPR. You can request access to your data, request deletion, correct inaccurate information, or export your data at any time. Email us and we'll handle it.
securityPage.gdprDesc2: Our database infrastructure is hosted in the EU through Supabase, which means your stored data stays within EU jurisdiction.
securityPage.supabaseDesc1: Handles authentication and stores saved deal data. SOC 2 Type II certified. Data encrypted at rest with AES-256. EU-hosted infrastructure.
securityPage.supabaseDesc2: Row-level security (RLS) is enabled on all database tables. This means queries are enforced at the database level — users can only read, update, or delete their own data. Even if there were an application-level bug, RLS prevents cross-account data access.
securityPage.vercelDesc: Application hosting and edge functions. SOC 2 certified. Provides DDoS protection, automatic HTTPS, and edge caching. Our serverless functions run here, including the file processing and AI analysis endpoints.
securityPage.anthropicDesc: Extracted text is sent to Anthropic's Claude API for contract analysis. Anthropic does not use API data to train models. Data is transmitted over TLS and is not stored by Anthropic beyond their standard API log retention for abuse monitoring.
securityPage.dontSell: Sell your data to anyone — ever
securityPage.dontAdvertise: Use your data for advertising or marketing profiles
securityPage.dontTrain: Train AI models on your uploads or saved data
securityPage.dontStore: Store your original uploaded files after processing
securityPage.dontShareBeyond: Share data with third parties beyond the services listed above
securityPage.dontAccess: Access your saved deals unless you ask us to for support purposes
securityPage.limitationsIntro: We believe in being upfront. We're a startup, and while we take security seriously, there are things we haven't done yet:
securityPage.limit1Desc: Our providers (Supabase, Vercel) are. We haven't gone through the certification process as a company.
securityPage.limit2Desc: We haven't hired a third party to attempt to break into our systems. It's on our roadmap.
securityPage.limit3Desc: If something went wrong, we'd handle it — but we don't have a documented, rehearsed procedure yet.
securityPage.limit4Desc: Data is encrypted in transit and at rest, but we can technically access stored data on the server side.
securityPage.limit5Desc: We don't have a dedicated security team. Security is handled by the same people building the product.
securityPage.limitationsOutro: We're improving this as we grow. If you have specific security requirements, reach out and we'll be honest about whether we can meet them.
securityPage.questionsIntro: If you have security concerns or questions about how we handle your data, we'd rather you ask than wonder.
securityPage.ctaTitle: Ready to analyze your first contract?
securityPage.ctaSubtitle: Your files are deleted immediately after processing. Only the AI-generated insights you choose to save are stored in your account.
